post_map_rules: Normalize date fragments to ISO-8601 UTC where possible.
Convert state and country fields into standard ISO-friendly location metadata.
Preserve unstructured narrative text as provenance-rich attachment metadata when not directly represented in the proto.
Normalize legacy location names into WGS-84 coordinates before persistence.
Preserve case identifiers and investigator notes as provenance fields.
Map ambiguous shapes to SHAPE_UNKNOWN when the source taxonomy does not align cleanly.
Standardize smartphone telemetry and focal-length fields before downstream analysis.
Retain source confidence fields separately from internal anomaly scoring.
Normalize device orientation and motion metrics into structured provenance metadata.
Map multi-spectral camera parameters into attachment metadata and annotated kinematics fields.
Preserve station identifiers and calibration snapshots as provenance.
Support streaming ingestion where the source exposes continuous observation feeds.
Align live sky-tracking station payloads to the canonical schema.
Preserve hardware metadata, camera parameters, and station health diagnostics.
Route raw captures and derived telemetry through the central ingestion pipeline.
